Name: Clear Hose Tube Pipe
Purpose: Enables transferring water into/out of the system.

Name: Arduino Uno Rev3
Purpose: The main brain that controls the system.

Name: Sponge Filter Pads
Purpose: Curing and filtering drained out water so it can be reused.

Name: Activated Charcoal Carbon Pellets bag
Purpose: Curing and filtering drained out water so it can be reused.

Name: Power Supply 12V 3A
Purpose: Provides the system with adequate power (Current & Voltage).

Name: Relay Module 12V
Purpose: Control high voltage devices (pump, valve, and aerator), depending on the Arduino signals.

Name: Aerator Oxygen Pump
Purpose: Feeds the water with oxygen as well as stabilizing pH levels.

Name: Water Solenoid Valve 12V
Purpose: Drains contaminated water out of the system.

Name: 12V DC Water Pump
Purpose: Pumps clean water into the system.

Name: Turbidity Sensor with Board Module
Purpose: An Analog sensor that measures water clarity by detecting suspended particles indicating water contamination levels.

Name: Analog TDS Sensor Module
Purpose: An Analog sensor that measures total dissolved solids (ppm) indicating water purity and salinity levels.

Name: pH Sensor
Purpose: An Analog sensor that measures the acidity/alkalinity and transmits the readings to the main processor.

Name: ~10L Fish Tank
Purpose: The main enclosure and body, and simulating an aquatic environment.
